failure.symptom: Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: post-card.tsx uses className 'm-4' (equal margin all sides) instead of 'mr-8 mt-4 mb-4', causing misaligned card grid in All Posts section. Same fix in post-card-skeleton.tsx.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 MongoDB+Redis。Bug：PostCard 用 m-4 等距 margin 导致网格对齐偏移
